country.description: The two-letter country code in [ISO_3166-1_alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2) format.

stateOrProvince.description:
The state or province code as defined in [ISO 3166-2](https://www.iso.org/standard/72483.html). For example, **ON** for Ontario, Canada.

Required for the following countries:
 - Australia
- Brazil
- Canada
- India
- Mexico
- New Zealand
- United States
